{{Quote|I speak your infidel tongue. It tastes like the waste excretions of an ill vhlor on my tongue, but I can speak it. Please, ask me something so I may deny you.|Kotaa Zun-qin to [[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]]|<ref name="The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory II: Rebirth">''[[The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory II: Rebirth]]''</ref>}}
'''Kotaa Zun-qin''' was a member of the [[Shaper caste]] of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]].

==Biography==
A [[Shaper Adept]] of [[Domain Zun-qin]], he was assigned to the ''[[Stalking Moon]]'', which was part of [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Qurang Lah]]'s fleet. When [[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]], [[Anakin Solo]], and [[Tahiri Veila]] captured the vessel, Zun-qin was taken captive. Corran interrogated him, to see if he would help them with the ''Stalking Moon''. Zun-qin refused, but offered to dissect Corran for the glory of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory II: Rebirth]]'' {{1st}}
